entity.label: Ahijah

entity.description: A Levite having charge of the sacred treasury in the temple (1 Chr. 26:20).

nodes.label: Ahijah
nodes.description: A Levite having charge of the sacred treasury in the temple (1 Chr. 26:20).

verses.text: And of the Levites, Ahijah was over the treasures of the house of God, and over the treasures of the dedicated things.
